title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
posterAlt: Hachi: A Dog's Tale (2009) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion. As their bond grows deeper, a beautiful relationship unfolds.
synopsis: Hachi: A Dog's Tale (2009) is a drama and family film from United Kingdom and United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a G certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
